assertion_results.text: Output maps ValidationError to 400 Bad Request
assertion_results.evidence: Output states ValidationError "maps to HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity" — completely reversed from the correct mapping

assertion_results.text: Output maps InvalidDataError to 422 Unprocessable Entity
assertion_results.evidence: Output states InvalidDataError (BadRequestError) "maps to HTTP 400 Bad Request" — reversed from the correct mapping

assertion_results.text: Output states ValidationError belongs in application or infrastructure layers
assertion_results.evidence: Output states "ValidationError belongs in the domain layer" — this is the wrong layer (domain belongs to InvalidDataError)

assertion_results.text: Output states InvalidDataError belongs in domain entities, value objects, or builders
assertion_results.evidence: Output states InvalidDataError "belongs at the boundary (HTTP handler or command parsing)" — wrong layer

assertion_results.text: Output clearly distinguishes the two errors by layer and purpose
assertion_results.evidence: Output inverts both the HTTP codes and the layer assignments for both errors, providing systematically wrong guidance
